violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw pork and raw beef stacked together in the same container in the front refrigerator.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop with the handle down in the product in the back area.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Jar of home canned food in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -In the front refrigerator raw chicken and raw pork on a shelf above fish.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop in the cold hold with the handle down in the product.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -In the back refrigerator the bottom needs cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
